infer_config_path.description: Paths (inside the model repository) to DeepStream nvinfer runtime configuration files (for example, nvdsinfer_config.yaml). If these file are not in the model repository folder, they must be created and copied into the model repository before deployment and are used by the DeepStream nvinfer plugin at runtime. Refer to https://docs.nvidia.com/metropolis/deepstream/dev-guide/text/DS_plugin_gst-nvinfer.html#gst-nvinfer-file-configuration-specifications for more details.

preprocess_config_path.description: Paths (inside the model repository) to DeepStream nvdspreprocess runtime configuration files (for example, nvdspreprocess_config*.yaml). These files define preprocessing operations that run before inference and are required when non-image tensors must be injected into the pipeline. They must already be copied into the model repository before deployment. Refer to https://docs.nvidia.com/metropolis/deepstream/dev-guide/text/DS_plugin_gst-nvdspreprocess.html for more details.

batch_timeout.description: Timeout in microseconds for batching multiple inputs

inference_timeout.description: Inference timeout in seconds, absence of this field means no timeout is enforced

tracker_config.description: Configuration for object tracking, absence of this field means no tracking is required

ll_lib_file.description: Path to the low-level tracker library file

ll_config_file.description: Path to the low-level tracker configuration file

width.description: Width of the tracker processing frame

height.description: Height of the tracker processing frame

display_tracking_id.description: Whether to display tracking IDs in the output

msgbroker_config.description: Configuration for message broker integration, absence of this field means no message broker is required

msgbroker_proto_lib_path.description: Path to the message broker protocol library

msgbroker_conn_str.description: Connection string for the message broker (e.g., 'localhost;9092' for Kafka)

msgconv_config_path.description: Path to the message conversion configuration file, refer to https://docs.nvidia.com/metropolis/deepstream/dev-guide/text/DS_plugin_gst-nvmsgconv.html for more details

enable_osd.description: Enable on-screen display overlays (bounding boxes, labels, etc.)

rtsp_mount_point.description: RTSP mount point path (e.g., '/ds_app'), not required if enable_stream is false

rtsp_port.description: RTSP server port number, not required if enable_stream is false

kitti_output_path.description: Paths for KITTI format output dumps
